overview.short: Mahipatgad is a hill fort situated on the east of the Khed.
overview.description: Mahipatgad is a hill fort situated on the east of the Khed. It is one of the largest forts in Maharashtra, with an area of 120 acres. This fort is located 23.6 km from the Khed City. The Mahipatgad.

topPlaces.name: Ghogare
topPlaces.description: Ghogare is a small village in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 431 residents in the village.

topPlaces.name: Wadi-jaitapur
topPlaces.description: Wadi-jaitapur is a small village in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 census of India recorded a total of 289 residents in the village.

topPlaces.description: Kashedi is a small village in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 872 residents in the village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahipatgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahipatgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (86 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahipatgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahipatgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahipatgad?
faq.a: Stays in Mahipatgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahipatgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ghogare, Wadi-jaitapur, Kashedi.
